task_completion.visual_evidence: The Promethean ActivInspire application window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add a large rectangular border framing the page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle shape is drawn on the canvas, positioned to frame the edges of the page.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Student of the Month' title
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Student of the Month' is visible on the canvas, centered near the top of the page.

task_completion.description: Add text labels for the form fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text labels 'Awarded to:', 'Date:', and 'Signed:' (or 'Teacher:') are visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Add horizontal lines for the form fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three horizontal line shapes are drawn on the canvas, placed next to or below the form field text labels.

task_completion.description: Add at least two Star or Circle shapes
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two shapes that are either Stars or Circles are visible on the canvas as decoration.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart file to the correct location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'student_certificate.flipchart', or the ActivInspire title bar displays 'student_certificate.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ActivInspire application interface (toolbars, canvas, menus) rather than a terminal window running scripts to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent actually placed elements on the canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: Text and shapes should be visible on the white flipchart canvas within ActivInspire, not just typed into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the certificate
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using the shape and text tools to build the certificate step-by-step, rather than just importing a pre-made image of a certificate.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The certificate must be saved as 'student_certificate.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. It requires specific text elements: 'Student of the Month' (title), 'Awarded to', 'Date', and 'Signed' (or 'Teacher'). It also requires specific shape elements: at least 1 large rectangle acting as a border, 3 horizontal lines for the form fields, and at least 2 decorative shapes which must be Stars or Circles.
